description:
[I "DON'T" WANT TO GAIN WEIGHT, I SWEAR]

One day you found out your fit roommate stuffing his face badly with pizza.

Forrest seemed like a gym Lover who would never want to gain a single pound but he had a deep secret, he into feederism and badly wants to have beer belly even he doesn't want to agree about that. He found out about his true preferences only then he was in high school but he been afraid, having beer belly is "unattractive" and dreaming about having one is taboo. There is conflict in his head but one day he told to himself "I will gain weight and get my beer belly!", but still insecure thoughts coming up to his head and even more then you found out about his secret feeding session

(Kinks= feederism, MANY FOCUS ON BELLY, food play, feeding, fat fetish, weight gain)

Fit ➪ Fat

I decided to do a characters with different nationalites: this time is Irish and Iranian. Next: Brazilian, Mexican, Canadian, Turkish, Liechtensteiner or Italian. I will choose probably one of them! If you want other nations so write in comments!
